_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: DB-column documentation gate — every SQLAlchemy column on every model must have a description; CI check fails on undocumented columns

steps.description: Implement the scanner + frozen baseline + RED-first library-form test. New files only: scripts/check_db_column_docs.py (walks Base.registry.mappers -> mapper.local_table.columns; reports FQNs like orch.db.models.WorkItem.id; CLI --baseline / --write-baseline / --json / --strict; library entrypoint scan(baseline, mappers) used by tests), orch/db/column_docs_baseline.txt (sorted FQN list with cleanup-backlog header comment, generated by --write-baseline against current main), tests/orch/db/__init__.py + tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py (covers: empty-baseline RED, committed-baseline GREEN, DaemonEvent.event_metadata reserved-name regression, synthetic-mapper composability, write-baseline roundtrip). RED-first: write the test, run it, capture ModuleNotFoundError on the not-yet-existing scanner, then implement. Forbidden: editing orch/db/models.py, docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md, Makefile, GH workflow, strategy doc, skill files, tracker, or any migration. Record EXACT baseline entry count in tdd_red_evidence.

Wire the gate into Makefile (new check-column-docs target; folded into quality via `|| true` warn-first), .github/workflows/test-quality.yml (one new `- run: make check-column-docs || true` step in lint-typecheck), docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md (§5 new gate row + §9 new ✅ row for 4.5), skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md + .claude/skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md (new section on the doc= requirement on new columns + baseline-scrub-incrementally pattern; both files byte-identical), ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md (§8 row 4.5 -> ✅ with CR-00085 + 2026-05-24; new follow-up tracker row for incremental column-docs scrub + gate-blocking flip; §11 dated changelog entry citing the EXACT baseline entry count from S01). MUST keep `|| true` on both surfaces (Makefile AND GH workflow) — burn-in policy. Forbidden: editing scanner/baseline/test files (S01 owns those), orch/db/models.py, docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md, any migration. Forbidden: removing `|| true` (that is the follow-up CR's job).

Per-agent review of S01+S02. CRITICAL bars: scanner walks Base.registry.mappers (not cls.__dict__); scanner reports SQL column names not python attribute names (`metadata` not `event_metadata`); baseline file is sorted; baseline header is a clear cleanup-backlog warning; Makefile `quality` target invokes check-column-docs via `|| true`; GH workflow step uses `|| true`; both skill copies are byte-identical; baseline entry count cited in tracker §11 matches S01's tdd_red_evidence verbatim; scope diff touches only files in design's Impacted Paths (forbidden: orch/db/models.py, docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md, any migration). All five+ design-named test cases present in tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py. TDD RED evidence: pre-implementation ModuleNotFoundError captured in S01 report.

Global cross-step review covering AC1–AC8. Execute each AC mechanically: AC1 (scanner --baseline /dev/null exits 1 with violations), AC2 (no `event_metadata` string in scanner output; `metadata` may appear), AC3 (make check-column-docs exits 0 on unchanged tree), AC4 (synthetic-mapper test provides equivalent evidence), AC5 (make quality exits 0; grep `|| true` in Makefile AND GH workflow), AC6 (pytest tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py -v all pass), AC7 (§5 row + §9 row + skill section + tracker §8 + tracker §11 all present and consistent on CR-ID + entry count), AC8 (git diff main --name-only matches Impacted Paths exactly; no orch/db/models.py / no schema doc / no migration). Cross-agent consistency: baseline entry count VERBATIM across S01 report + tracker §11 + design Notes; `check-column-docs` target name spelled identically in all five surfaces. Run make test-unit AND make test-integration.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests in tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py)
QV: Unit tests (must pass; tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py runs here)
QV: Diff coverage — new lines in scripts/check_db_column_docs.py and tests/orch/db/test_column_docs.py must clear ~90% threshold
QV: Secret scanning (gitleaks) — no secrets expected; tooling/docs change

Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill. Look for: (a) did S01 walk Base.registry.mappers correctly or trip over Base.metadata / event_metadata rename; (b) is the baseline file sorted and stable across runs; (c) did S02 honour `|| true` warn-first on BOTH Makefile and GH workflow surfaces; (d) does the baseline entry count match across S01 tdd_red_evidence + tracker §11 + design Notes; (e) was scope discipline maintained (no orch/db/models.py, no schema doc, no migration in the diff); (f) compare against CR-00046's analogous scanner-kit shipping cadence — same time/fix-cycle footprint or worse, and why; (g) TDD RED evidence quality — pre-implementation ModuleNotFoundError captured, not a post-hoc 'n/a'.
